use_cases: Display scroll progress as a fixed top bar on long-form content pages
Provide visual feedback on reading progress for articles and documentation
Enhance user navigation awareness on scrolling-heavy interfaces
ai_summary: A scroll-linked spring animation component that renders a fixed progress bar at the top of the viewport. Uses Framer Motion's useSpring and useScroll hooks to create smooth, physics-based animation tied to scroll position. The pink progress indicator scales horizontally based on scroll progress, providing users with intuitive feedback about their position within a page.
